## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX contact and resolve technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vivek Shankar is the new GrowthX account manager, replacing Joe after an internal reorg.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Tyler Phelps is locked out of the shared Slack channel; Vivek will send a new invite to `tphelps@diligent.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [The meeting was aborted due to Kezia's connection issues; they will reconvene on Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

## Topics

### Account Handoff

  - [Vivek Shankar is the new GrowthX account manager, replacing Joe.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [This change is due to an internal reorg at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Vivek has been briefed by Kezia and is up to speed on the account.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Technical Blockers

  - [**Slack Access:** Tyler Phelps is locked out of the shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [This is a recurring issue, not a one-time event.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Vivek will send a new invite to `tphelps@diligent.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [A previous invite (from "Alice at GrowthX") was sent but not received.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Meeting Platform:** The call was aborted due to Kezia's connection issues.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Kezia requested moving the meeting to Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Vivek will install Teams, requiring a 5-minute delay.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Tyler is available to reschedule for Thursday or Friday if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:** Send new Slack invite to `tphelps@diligent.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Vivek:** Install Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**All:** Reconvene on Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wyXnGsd8QKhroeT4SP13zPu9JNRymH_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
